{{Quote|She has more experience. She was an underminister here at the palace. Her ideas are sound and grounded in reality. Unfortunately, her palace experience hurts her in some quarters, and her bluntness hurts her in others. She has her faction, but is expected to lose.|[[Veda (Galacian)|Veda]]|<ref name="Jedi Apprentice: The Mark of the Crown" />}}
'''Wila Prammi''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who became the first [[Galacian Gubernatorial election, 44 BBY|democratically elected]] [[King/Legends|Monarch]] of [[Gala]], after [[Queen/Legends|Queen]] [[Veda (Galacian)|Veda]] decided to abdicate the throne.

==Biography==
Prammi had more political experience than her candidates, [[Deca Brun]] and [[Prince/Legends|Prince]] [[Beju]], having served in the government of the now deceased [[King/Legends|King]] [[Cana]]. It was thought by many that her position within the monarchy seemed to distance her from the majority of the people. However, due to revelations about Brun's abuses of campaign funds, and after Beju withdrew and supported Prammi's campaign, she was elected to succeed Veda.<ref name="Jedi Apprentice: The Mark of the Crown" />
